items.title: Logitech’s latest G515 Rapid TKL low-profile gaming keyboard just hit a new all-time low at $130
items.summary:
We just spotted a deal at Amazon that drops Logitech’s latest G515 Rapid TKL gaming keyboard in black down to $129.99 shipped. Don’t forget to clip the on-page coupon to see the discounted price during checkout. This is one of the newest additions to Logitech’s G series keyboards that hit the scene towards the end of last year carrying a $170 price tag. This has only been discounted once before today since its debut when it hit the $161 mark earlier this year, but today’s deal marks its steepest price drop to date at $40 off. This is the lowest price we tracked for this wired model, so be sure to snag it now if you’re in the market to buy a new gaming keyboard for your battlestation. Head below for more details.

items.title: Huge $550 discount knocks Samsung’s 49-inch 240Hz Odyssey G9 curved gaming monitor to $750 today
items.summary:
Today only, as part of its Deals of the Day offers, Best Buy has listed Samsung’s Odyssey 49-inch curved gaming monitor down at $749.99 shipped. This particular model has fetched as much as $1,300 recently at Amazon, where it is currently going for $900. Best Buy’s offer today takes a solid $550 off its usual going rate to mark one of the lowest prices we have tracked for it to date. This display dropped to $680 just ahead of Black Friday last year, and it’s now within just $70 of that all-time low. While this may not be the newest ultrawide model in Samsung’s Odyssey lineup, it remains a solid pick for folks looking to upgrade their battlestation, and it’s a lot easier on your wallet right now as well. items.title: Tim Cook stepping down as Apple CEO, John Ternus taking over
items.summary: The transition has been expected for some time and ends one of the longer and more impactful runs a CEO has had at any company. Cook had inherited a company that many industry watchers and enthusiasts struggled to separate from its famed founder. What he leaves behind is a $4 trillion business with annual revenue that has more than quadrupled on his watch.
